title: Lovely Professional University Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Lovely Professional University Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Lovely Professional University Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lovely Professional University Capital India:
Lovely Professional University Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University Capital India!
